channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal Expert Warns Against Resignation Demands for Gbajabiamila Amid PFIPC Scandal
item.description: Legal practitioner Jiti Ogunye has strongly opposed calls for Chief of Staff Femi Gbajabiamila to resign over PFIPC allegations, arguing it would undermine justice. He stressed that Gbajabiamila shoul...

item.title: 190 active wildfires burning across northern Ontario as evacuations and restrictions intensify
item.description: A record 190 wildfires are currently burning across northern Ontario, prompting widespread evacuations, air quality alerts, and strict fire bans. The Canadian government has activated emergency respon...

item.title: The IEC's Critical Role in Safeguarding South Africa's Electoral Integrity
item.description: The article underscores the importance of South Africa's Independent Electoral Commission (IEC) in maintaining democratic integrity amidst political challenges. It highlights the IEC's role in ensurin...

item.title: Climate Change Challenges France’s Nuclear Energy Strategy
item.description: The article discusses how rising temperatures in Europe are impacting France's reliance on nuclear energy. Extreme heat events have led to the temporary shutdown of several nuclear reactors, raising c...

item.title: DFA confirms 81 Filipino seafarers are out of Strait of Hormuz conflict zone
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA) has confirmed that 81 Filipino seafarers have been moved out of the Strait of Hormuz conflict area, which has been a focal point of geopolitical tensions due to...

item.title: Poppy Misses Upheaval Festival Due to Hazardous Wildfire Smoke, Band Performs Without Her
item.description: Poppy was unable to perform at the Upheaval Festival in Grand Rapids, Michigan, due to hazardous wildfire smoke that reached an Air Quality Index (AQI) of over 350. Her band took the stage without her...

item.title: Smoke Blankets GTA as Orange Air Quality Warning Remains; Rain Expected to Provide Temporary Relief
item.description: Heavy smoke continues to blanket much of the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) under an orange air quality warning, with Environment Canada advising residents to limit outdoor activities. The smoke, originat...

item.title: White House Reportedly Investigates Whether Officials Used Insider Information on Prediction Markets
item.description: According to a Wall Street Journal report cited by Raw Story, White House lawyers have been investigating whether administration officials or people with access to sensitive government information may...

item.title: Sanjay Mishra Wins National Film Award for Supporting Role in 'Bhakshak'
item.description: Actor Sanjay Mishra has been awarded the National Film Award for Best Supporting Actor for his role in Bhumi Pednekar's film 'Bhakshak'. In a statement, Mishra expressed gratitude to the jury and refl...

item.title: Palestinian Footballer Killed in Settler Attack in West Bank
item.description: A 17-year-old Palestinian footballer, Fadi Hamdallah al-Nassan, died following a settler attack in the occupied West Bank. The incident occurred on July 11 when Israeli settlers attacked his village, ...

item.title: Successful Blind Date Between Teacher and Advocate
item.description: Hugh, a 55-year-old teacher and musician, and Edie, a 50-year-old independent advocate, met for a blind date that turned into a delightful conversation. They bonded over shared interests in music, foo...

item.title: Princess Diana's Appearance at the 1993 'Jurassic Park' Premiere
item.description: This article recounts the historic 1993 premiere of Steven Spielberg's 'Jurassic Park' in London, attended by Princess Diana. The event, held at the Empire Theatre in Leicester Square, was a charity b...

item.title: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton Lies About Crowd Size at Campaign Event
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, a MAGA candidate running to replace Senator John Cornyn, faced backlash after falsely claiming hundreds attended his campaign rally. Local reports revealed the event...

item.title: Tanzania celebrates Mandela Day with unity calls and REB urges companies to boost global competitiveness
item.description: On July 18, 2026, Tanzania commemorated Mandela Day by emphasizing unity, volunteerism, and youth empowerment as key pillars for national development. The event highlighted the importance of collectiv...

item.title: Residents raise concerns about rodent problems at King Charles's Sandringham estate
item.description: Residents of the Sandringham estate in Norfolk have raised concerns about an ongoing rodent problem affecting gardens at properties owned by King Charles. The issue was discussed at a recent Sandringh...

item.title: Mali rebels ambush army convoy in northern region, causing casualties
item.description: In the northern Gao region of Mali, a joint attack by jihadist militants affiliated with al-Qaida and the separatist Azawad Liberation Front targeted a military convoy on Saturday. The assault resulte...

item.title: OVP Ordered to Return Confidential Funds Despite COA Opinion
item.description: House Prosecutor Terry Ridon clarified that the Commission on Audit's (COA) unmodified opinion for 2025 does not negate the previous order directing the Office of the Vice President (OVP) under Sara D...

item.title: Northern Ontario Wildfires Force Evacuations as Premier Doug Ford Meets Residents
item.description: Nearly 200 wildfires are burning across Ontario, producing thick smoke that has spread into parts of the United States. The situation has led to evacuation orders for several communities, including Ar...

item.title: Pogacar extends lead after dominant 14th stage victory in Tour de France
item.description: Slovenian cyclist Tadej Pogacar secured his fourth stage win of the 113th Tour de France on Saturday, extending his overall lead over Jonas Vingegaard to four and a half minutes. The 27-year-old UAE T...

item.title: Trump Media offers paid API for real-time access to presidential social media posts
item.description: Donald Trump's social media company, Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), is considering charging Wall Street firms up to $100,000 monthly for faster access to posts on its Truth Social platform. Th...
